_comment: 单一数据源：改文案后运行 node build.js。个人项目在 portfolioProjects；工作经历用 #experience / exp-project-*。

description.en: Spring AI applications, conversational workflows, multimodal chat, vector retrieval, and document Q&A.
description.zh: 围绕 Spring AI、对话流程、图文多模态、向量检索与文档问答的应用实践。

description.en: Multi-module backend systems with service splitting, messaging, distributed coordination, orders, payments, and search.
description.zh: 多模块后端系统，覆盖服务拆分、消息队列、分布式协作、订单支付与搜索等能力。

description.en: Spring Boot business systems for local-life services, catering, campaigns, user flows, and high-concurrency scenarios.
description.zh: 基于 Spring Boot 的业务系统实践，覆盖本地生活、餐饮、活动营销、用户流程与高并发场景。

imageAlt.zh: 天机学堂在线教育平台封面

title.zh: 天机学堂在线教育平台

description.en: A Spring Cloud microservices online education platform covering course management, online learning, course purchases and payments, exam practice, media, messages, search, and analytics.
description.zh: 基于 Spring Cloud 微服务架构的在线教育平台，覆盖课程管理、在线学习、支付购买、考试练习、媒资、消息、搜索与数据看板等核心场景。

en: Organized gateway, authentication, course, learning, exam, media, trade, pay, message, search, and data services with Nacos configuration and Feign calls
Implemented course lifecycle features including category management, catalog chapters, teacher binding, video upload, question binding, and listing review workflow
Built course purchase flow from login, browsing, cart, order confirmation, payment, permission acquisition, and learning access
Integrated Redis, Redisson, RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch, cloud media storage, and SMS notifications for distributed business scenarios
zh: 按网关、认证、课程、学习、考试、媒资、交易、支付、消息、搜索与数据等服务拆分架构，结合 Nacos 配置与 Feign 通信
实现课程分类、章节目录、教师关联、视频上传、题目绑定与上架审核等课程生命周期功能
打通课程购买流程：登录、浏览课程、加入购物车、确认订单、支付、获得课程权限并开始学习
整合 Redis、Redisson、RabbitMQ、Elasticsearch、云媒资存储与短信通知，支撑分布式业务场景

imageAlt.en: Xiaozhong Dianping local life review backend cover
imageAlt.zh: 小众点评本地生活点评系统封面

title.en: Xiaozhong Dianping Local Life Review System
title.zh: 小众点评本地生活点评系统

description.en: A Spring Boot backend for local-life reviews, supporting user login, shop queries, blog sharing, social interactions, voucher release, and flash-sale coupon purchasing.
description.zh: 基于 Spring Boot 的本地生活点评系统后端，支持用户登录、商铺查询、博客分享、社交互动、优惠券发放与秒杀抢购。

en: Built user authentication with mobile verification code login, session management, and current-user context storage
Developed shop and blog modules supporting shop lookup, category queries, blog publishing, likes, hot blog ranking, and user blog lists
Implemented voucher management and flash-sale purchasing flows with Redis-based caching and distributed-lock practice
Structured the backend around controller, service, mapper, DTO, entity, and utility layers using MyBatis-Plus with MySQL persistence
zh: 实现手机号验证码登录、Session 会话管理与当前用户上下文存储
完成商铺与博客模块，支持商铺查询、分类筛选、博客发布、点赞、热门博客与用户博客列表
实现优惠券管理与秒杀抢购流程，结合 Redis 缓存与分布式锁练习高并发处理
基于 MyBatis-Plus 与 MySQL 持久化，按 controller、service、mapper、DTO、entity 与 utils 分层组织后端代码

description.en: A frontend-backend separated Spring AI learning demo covering chatbots, multimodal image-text conversations, business Q&A, conversation history, and PDF-based RAG.
description.zh: 用于学习 Spring AI 的前后端分离 Demo，覆盖聊天机器人、图文多模态对话、业务问答、会话历史与基于 PDF 的 RAG 问答。

en: Built general chat, emotional-support simulation, and business customer-service scenarios with reusable conversation APIs
Implemented multimodal chat by accepting prompt, chatId, and optional image files, then routing text-only and image-text requests appropriately
Developed ChatPDF workflow that uploads PDF files, splits pages into documents, writes vectors into VectorStore, and filters retrieval by current session file
Integrated ChatMemory with chatId-based conversation history for multi-turn dialogue and contextual PDF Q&A
zh: 实现通用聊天、情绪安抚模拟器与业务智能客服等典型 Spring AI 对话场景
支持传入 prompt、chatId 与可选图片文件，按纯文本或图文多模态路径处理对话请求
完成 ChatPDF 流程：上传 PDF、按页拆分 Document、写入 VectorStore，并按当前会话文件过滤检索
结合 ChatMemory 与 chatId 会话历史，实现多轮对话与带上下文的 PDF 问答

imageAlt.en: SK Knowledge RAG knowledge base system cover
imageAlt.zh: SK Knowledge 智能知识库问答系统封面

title.en: SK Knowledge RAG Knowledge Base System
title.zh: SK Knowledge 智能知识库问答系统

description.en: An intelligent private knowledge base and Q&A system built with Spring Boot, supporting document upload, vector retrieval, AI chat, RBAC permissions, and conversation history.
description.zh: 基于 Spring Boot 构建的私有化智能知识库与问答系统，支持文档上传、向量检索、AI 对话、RBAC 权限与会话历史。

en: Built multi-knowledge-base management with retrieval configuration, knowledge sharing, and permission control
Implemented document processing for PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT, CSV, and MD, including text extraction, semantic chunking, vectorization, and status tracking
Integrated Weaviate, MinIO, MySQL, MongoDB, and Redis for vector search, object storage, business persistence, and cache/session support
Developed OpenAI-compatible chat with model management, SSE streaming responses, context association, conversation history, and Spring Security + JWT authentication
zh: 实现多知识库创建与管理，支持检索参数配置、知识库分享与权限控制
支持 PDF、DOC、DOCX、TXT、CSV、MD 等文档处理，完成文本提取、语义分块、向量化与状态跟踪
整合 Weaviate、MinIO、MySQL、MongoDB 与 Redis，支撑向量检索、对象存储、业务持久化与缓存/会话能力
开发兼容 OpenAI API 的 AI 对话能力，支持模型管理、SSE 流式响应、上下文关联、会话历史与 Spring Security + JWT 认证

imageAlt.en: AI knowledge base and Q&A platform cover
imageAlt.zh: AI 智能知识库与问答平台封面

title.zh: AI 智能知识库与问答平台

description.en: An intelligent knowledge base and Q&A system built on large language models, using Spring AI and vector retrieval to improve search quality and user experience.
description.zh: 基于大语言模型构建的智能知识库与问答系统，结合 Spring AI 与向量检索等能力，提升信息检索质量与使用体验。

en: Built an AI assistant with Spring AI, supporting conversational Q&A, prompt optimization, and conversation memory persistence in MySQL
Implemented Function Calling to collect user information automatically, write it into the database, and update session context dynamically
Developed a conversational announcement system with vectorized storage and retrieval, enabling natural-language question answering
Built a RAG knowledge base on Redis Stack, combining vector retrieval with LLM generation for intelligent document search and summarization
zh: 基于 Spring AI 集成大模型，开发 AI 助手，实现对话问答、提示词优化与 MySQL 会话记忆存储
基于 Function Calling 实现用户信息自动采集与入库，并动态更新会话上下文
实现对话式公告系统，完成公告向量化存储与检索，支持自然语言问答
基于 Redis Stack 构建 RAG 知识库，结合向量检索与大模型生成，实现文档智能检索与总结

imageAlt.en: Red Packet Rain Lottery System cover

description.en: Enterprise-level lottery activity management platform, supporting red packet rain, lottery events, prizes, and member management. Suitable for high-concurrency scenarios such as corporate annual meetings and holiday events.
description.zh: 面向企业活动场景的抽奖管理平台，支持红包雨、奖品管理与会员管理，适用于年会与节日等高并发活动。

en: Developed User and Activity modules with accurate real-time data display for frontend
Optimized high-concurrency using Redis preloading and token bucket + Lua scripts to prevent overselling
Implemented asynchronous lottery processing with RabbitMQ for improved system stability
Achieved QPS of 2312 on core interfaces through JMeter performance testing
zh: 完成用户与活动模块开发，保障前端实时数据展示准确
通过 Redis 预热与令牌桶 + Lua 脚本优化并发，避免超卖
引入 RabbitMQ 异步抽奖流程，提升系统稳定性
核心接口压测达到 2312 QPS

description.en: A catering management system with frontend-backend separation, including a merchant backend management system and a user mini program. Supports dishes, set meals, categories, and orders, optimizing user ordering experience and merchant management efficiency.
description.zh: 前后端分离的餐饮管理系统，包含商家后台与用户端小程序，覆盖菜品、套餐、分类与订单等核心流程。

en: Developed merchant backend managing employees, dishes, categories, and set meals with pagination
Implemented mini-program caching for dishes and set meals, improving frontend interaction efficiency
Built shopping cart management (add, view, clear) and order submission workflow
Designed payment flow with simulated WeChat Pay integration for smooth user ordering experience
zh: 实现商家端员工、菜品、分类与套餐管理，并支持分页查询
实现菜品与套餐缓存，优化用户端交互响应效率
完成购物车与下单流程开发，打通关键交易链路
设计模拟微信支付流程，提升下单体验完整性

description.en: A city-based carpooling platform supporting drivers posting trips, passenger route matching, order generation, and message notifications. Based on microservices architecture with high availability and real-time communication, covering registration, trip publishing, ride invitations, and complete payment workflow.
description.zh: 基于微服务的同城拼车平台，支持行程发布、路线匹配、订单处理与消息通知，覆盖从注册到支付的完整流程。

en: Developed User module with personal info, password modification, and document uploads
Integrated Baidu OCR for automatic vehicle and identity document recognition
Designed trip fare calculation algorithm using Decorator pattern with map API integration
Implemented order timeout handling and WebSocket real-time push for smooth user interaction
zh: 完成用户模块开发，支持资料维护、密码修改与证件上传
接入百度 OCR，实现证件信息自动识别
使用装饰器模式实现计价算法，并结合地图 API 完成路径计算
实现订单超时处理与 WebSocket 实时推送，提升交互体验

en.title: Joyce | Portfolio
en.metaDescription: Joyce's portfolio: Business QA at HSBC Software Development, ISTQB Certified Tester; Java backend projects, Python foundation, Spring AI practice, and future LangChain learning.
en.ogDescription: Business QA · ISTQB · Java backend · Python · Spring AI
en.twitterDescription: Business QA · ISTQB · Java backend · Python · Spring AI

text..first-visit-modal-body: This site works best on desktop. On mobile or in WeChat it adapts; in WeChat if something looks wrong, tap … → Open in browser.
text..subtitle: Business QA at HSBC Software Development · ISTQB Certified Tester · AI application engineering direction
text..tagline: I bring a testing mindset, Java backend foundation, and Python skills to reliable delivery, with my current growth focused on AI application development.
text.#about > .section-intro: Testing is my craft; Java engineering is my technical base; AI application development is where I am growing next.
text..about-summary p:nth-child(1): I work in software testing at HSBC Software Development (Guangdong) and hold ISTQB certification, with a Master's in Technology and Engineering Management. Day to day I run end-to-end testing across banking systems—especially card and points journeys—where accuracy, data consistency, and customer impact matter.
text..about-summary p:nth-child(2): Alongside testing delivery, Java is my existing backend foundation, so my current hands-on projects still build on the traditional Java/Spring stack. At the same time, I am expanding toward the Python AI application ecosystem, with LangChain and AI engineering workflows as my next learning focus.
text..about-list li:nth-child(1): Focusing on AI application development with Spring AI, RAG, knowledge-base Q&A, and model service integration
text..about-list li:nth-child(2): Continuing Java backend practice through existing project experience, Spring Boot, API design, persistence integration, and system design
text..about-list li:nth-child(3): Expanding into the Python AI application ecosystem, with LangChain as a key next learning direction
text.#skills > .section-intro: AI application development is my leading technical growth focus, while quality assurance remains my professional foundation. I combine Spring AI and Java/Spring backend practice with end-to-end testing, API validation, regression coverage, data consistency checks, and banking-domain delivery experience.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(1) p: Hands-on with Spring AI and LLM application patterns, including chat APIs, multimodal conversation, ChatPDF, vector retrieval, knowledge-base Q&A, conversation memory, and OpenAI-compatible model integration.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(2) p: Professional QA practice across functional, API, regression, and end-to-end testing, with strong attention to requirements analysis, defect tracking, data consistency, business rule validation, and release quality.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(3) p: Proficient in Java backend development with Spring Boot and SSM-style projects; owns REST API development, service implementation, and persistence integration with disciplined interface design.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(4) p: Familiar with Redis and RabbitMQ, with a working understanding of caching and message queue mechanisms.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(5) p: Understands distributed system basics, with hands-on Spring Cloud microservices and message queue integration for async and cross-service flows.
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(6) p: Familiar with credit-card business flows—points programs, marketing campaigns, and payment validation across channels and systems.
text.#projects > .section-intro: Practice and notes across backend systems, distributed architectures, and AI-style applications.
text.#experience > .section-intro: Testing and project work at HSBC Software Development and Kehua Data.
text.#exp-project-1 h4: Project 1: Hang Seng Bank FUN Center Credit Card Points Mall
text.#exp-project-4 h4: OCT Integrated Water–Electricity & Infrastructure Management Platform (incl. Metro Energy Operations subsystem)
text.footer .footer-hint-text: Best on desktop. In WeChat: … → Open in browser

html.#exp-project-1 .project-overview: Project Overview: Raise cardholder engagement and satisfaction with an integrated points platform—accounts, redemption, campaigns, and lucky-draw experiences—alongside operations reporting tests to keep business statistics accurate.
html.#exp-project-1 li:nth-child(1): Led core testing for the points mall: account journeys, campaign surfaces, FUN Shop redemption, and Lucky Draw modules.
html.#exp-project-1 li:nth-child(2): Ran end-to-end coverage across the points lifecycle, pairing the mobile app with back-office reporting to verify data accuracy and consistency.
html.#exp-project-1 li:nth-child(3): Authored and executed functional, API, and regression suites; tracked defects with emphasis on points debits, reward fulfillment, and reporting logic.
html.#exp-project-4 .project-overview: Project Overview: OCT integrated water–electricity and infrastructure management platform, including the metro energy operations subsystem, spanning billing and intelligent O&M monitoring.
html.#exp-project-4 li:nth-child(1): Owned end-to-end billing testing—rules, charging, invoicing, and reconciliation—to protect logic and data consistency; extended coverage to customer and asset management modules, including exception paths.
html.#exp-project-4 li:nth-child(2): Tested the intelligent O&M monitoring stack (equipment monitoring, energy management, alarms, analytics microservices) and supported environment setup plus regression passes to reproduce and verify complex scenarios faster.

zh.title: Joyce | 个人作品集
zh.hiddenTitle: 👋 记得回来看看 - Joyce 作品集
zh.metaDescription: Joyce 的个人作品集：汇丰软件测试从业者，ISTQB 认证测试工程师，具备 Java 后端项目经验、Python 基础、Spring AI 实践，并将继续学习 LangChain。
zh.ogDescription: 汇丰软件测试 | ISTQB 认证测试工程师 | Java 后端 | Python | Spring AI
zh.twitterDescription: 汇丰软件测试 | ISTQB 认证测试工程师 | Java 后端 | Python | Spring AI

text..first-visit-modal-body: 本站推荐在电脑浏览器访问；手机与微信内也可使用。若在微信内显示异常，请点右上角「…」→「在浏览器中打开」。
text..hero-badge: 正在寻找软件工程师机会
text..subtitle: 汇丰软件测试从业者 · ISTQB 认证测试员 · AI 应用工程方向
text..tagline: 我以测试思维、Java 后端基础与 Python 能力构建可靠系统，目前重点成长方向集中在 AI 应用开发。
text.#about > .section-intro: 以测试为职业，以 Java 工程能力为技术基础，并将 AI 应用开发作为当前重点成长方向。
text..about-summary p:nth-child(1): 我目前在汇丰从事软件测试工作，并持有 ISTQB 认证，同时拥有技术与工程管理硕士学位。日常工作覆盖银行多系统端到端测试，关注精度、数据一致性与客户影响。
text..about-summary p:nth-child(2): 在测试交付之外，Java 是我已有的后端技术基础，因此目前项目实践仍以传统 Java/Spring 技术栈为主；同时我也在拓展 Python AI 应用生态能力，并将 LangChain 与 AI 工程化流程作为后续重点学习方向。
text..about-list li:nth-child(1): 聚焦 AI 应用开发，持续实践 Spring AI、RAG、知识库问答与模型服务接入
text..about-list li:nth-child(2): 基于已有项目经验继续深化 Java 后端能力，包括 Spring Boot、接口设计、持久化集成与系统设计
text..about-list li:nth-child(3): 拓展 Python AI 应用生态能力，并将 LangChain 作为后续重点学习方向
text.#skills > .section-intro: AI 应用开发是当前重点成长方向，同时测试与质量保障是我的职业基础。我将 Spring AI 与 Java/Spring 后端实践，和端到端测试、接口验证、回归覆盖、数据一致性校验及银行业务交付经验结合起来。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(1) p: 具备 Spring AI 与大模型应用实践经验，覆盖聊天接口、图文多模态、ChatPDF、向量检索、知识库问答、会话记忆与 OpenAI 兼容模型接入等场景。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(2) p: 具备职业 QA 实践经验，覆盖功能测试、接口测试、回归测试与端到端测试；重视需求分析、缺陷跟踪、数据一致性、业务规则校验与发布质量。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(3) p: 熟练使用 Java 进行后端开发，具备 Spring Boot / SSM 项目经验；能承担 REST 接口、业务服务与持久化集成开发，熟悉接口设计规范。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(4) p: 熟悉 Redis 与 RabbitMQ，了解缓存与消息队列机制。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(5) p: 了解分布式系统基础，具备 Spring Cloud 微服务及消息队列的实际使用经验。
text.#skills .skill-card:nth-child(6) p: 熟悉银行信用卡相关业务，包括积分、营销活动与支付校验等典型场景。
text.#projects > .section-intro: 后端、分布式与 AI 应用等方向的实践与总结。
text.#experience > .section-intro: 汇丰软件开发与科华数据期间的测试与项目经历。
text..company: 汇丰软件开发（广东）有限公司
text.#exp-project-1 h4: 项目一：恒生银行 FUN Center 信用卡积分商城
text.#experience .experience-item:nth-of-type: 科华数据股份有限公司
text.#exp-project-4 h4: 华侨城水电一体化及基础设施综合管理平台（含地铁能源运营子系统）
text.footer .footer-hint-text: 推荐电脑端打开，体验更佳

html.#exp-project-1 .project-overview: 项目概述：提升信用卡用户活跃度与客户满意度，构建集积分账户、积分兑换、营销活动及抽奖互动于一体的一站式积分运营平台；同时参与运营报表功能测试，保障业务数据统计准确性。
html.#exp-project-1 li:nth-child(1): 负责积分商城核心功能测试，包括积分账户页面、营销活动展示、FUN Shop 积分兑换及 Lucky Draw 抽奖活动等模块。
html.#exp-project-1 li:nth-child(2): 深入参与积分商城全流程测试，结合前端 APP 与后台报表数据，验证业务数据传递的准确性与一致性。
html.#exp-project-1 li:nth-child(3): 编写并执行功能测试、接口测试及回归测试，跟踪缺陷并重点验证积分扣减、奖励发放及报表统计等业务逻辑。
html.#exp-project-4 .project-overview: 项目概述：华侨城水电一体化及基础设施综合管理平台，含地铁能源运营子系统，覆盖计费与智能运维监控等能力。
html.#exp-project-4 li:nth-child(1): 负责计费系统全流程测试（计费规则、收费、账单、对账），保障计费逻辑准确性与数据一致性，同时参与客户管理、资产管理等业务模块功能与异常场景测试。
html.#exp-project-4 li:nth-child(2): 负责智能运维监控系统测试（设备监控、能源管理、告警通知、数据分析等微服务模块），并支持测试环境搭建与回归验证，提升复杂场景问题复现与验证效率。
